title: pinus lasiocarpa f. compacta
intro: Pinus lasiocarpa f. compacta, also known as the Rocky Mountain subalpine fir, is a compact or dwarf form of the Rocky Mountain fir tree (Pinus lasiocarpa). The essential oil extracted from this plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pinus lasiocarpa f. compacta include its potential to reduce stress, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used in aromatherapy or applied topically to soothe skin irritations.
